name: Particle Avatar Engine
description: Client-side Canvas 2D point-cloud avatar generator. Converts photos to dot patterns with luminance-based sizing, assembly/drift animation, and default silhouette fallback. Zero server dependencies.

input.name: options
input.description: Canvas resolution, sampling gap, brightness threshold, elliptical mask, max particles

output.name: particles
output.description: Point cloud array ready for Canvas animation

author: Tiranyx
